sections.heading: Intellectual Property
sections.body: All original content on VeteransLedger — including written articles, editorial commentary, data compilation, structural organisation, and source code — is protected by copyright and remains the intellectual property of VeteransLedger and its contributors.

sections.heading: Historical Materials
sections.body: Primary source documents, wartime photographs, official records, and other materials that are in the public domain are reproduced here for educational purposes. Public domain determinations are made in good faith based on publication date, government-origin status, and applicable law.

sections.heading: DMCA Notice
sections.body: VeteransLedger complies with the Digital Millennium Copyright Act (DMCA). If you believe material on this site infringes your copyright, submit a takedown notice to VeteransLedger@gmail.com containing: (1) identification of the copyrighted work; (2) identification of the infringing material and its location on our site; (3) your contact information; (4) a statement of good faith belief; (5) a statement of accuracy under penalty of perjury; (6) your signature.

sections.heading: Permitted Use
sections.body: You may reproduce VeteransLedger original content for non-commercial, educational use provided you attribute VeteransLedger as the source and link to the original page. Any other use — including commercial reproduction, systematic scraping, or incorporation into AI training datasets — requires written permission.
